content.en:
Deserted Tower.

Ye Tian's first deity is cultivating, his current cultivation is the peak realm of the cosmic god, he will not impact the domination realm for the time being, he can only improve other aspects.

"Comprehend the Chaos Golden Desolation Recipe first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is a supreme secret technique in Chaos, and he has already begun to cultivate the sixth level of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

However, the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is very difficult to cultivate, and if you want to cultivate the sixth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Recipe to the consummation realm, it will take at least hundreds of millions of years.

Strictly speaking, the universe is not suitable for cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and there is a lack of auxiliary materials.

But in the Desolate Realm, there were treasures that belonged to the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to assist in cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, which was enough for Ye Tian to shorten the time for cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique by countless times.

And this treasure is the power of the origin of the desolate world!

Once, he used the power of the origin of the desolate realm to cultivate, and part of the purpose of his ruling of the desolate realm was for the power of the origin.

"The Wasteland is not the real world, but the top Chaos Spirit Treasure, the so-called Origin Power is the origin of the Chaos Spirit Treasure, but the Wasteland is very special, even if the origin of the Wasteland is consumed, it can be slowly restored. As long as the Origin Consumption of the Desolate Realm does not exceed 30 percent, it will not affect the Desolate Realm! 30 percent of the Desolate Origin is enough for me to cultivate for a long time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to mobilize the origin of the desolate realm to descend, turning the surrounding area into a sea of origin.

Rumble!!!!

The cultivation that belongs to Ye Tian has begun!

In the ocean of the power of the source, Ye Tian continued to absorb and refine, and comprehended the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

The Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, which had been cultivated extremely slowly, was now progressing at an incredible speed, and time was slowly passing like this.

"What a terrifying Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique of the sixth layer is much more terrifying than the fifth layer, the more I cultivate this supreme secret, the more terrifying it becomes, and now I have only improved a little bit, but I have expanded my limit a lot, if I cultivate to the sixth layer of the consummation realm, my limit will be beyond imagination!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

He was very glad that he had obtained the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, otherwise he would not have such combat power today, and no matter how strong he was, he would only be slightly more powerful than those sons of the Twelve Universes.

The main factor that really made him far superior to those Sons of the Era was the Chaos Golden Desolation.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

"The sixth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is complete, the progress speed is too fast, and then we need to slow down, stabilize the foundation, and we need to raise the strength again!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he began to take all kinds of treasures that increased his strength, and quickly improved his strength.

Soon, he raised his strength to the limit, and he continued to cultivate the sixth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

In the eighth hundred years of entering the Desolate Realm, Ye Tian finally completely cultivated the sixth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the extreme realm, and then went further to the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique.

However, one day is not as good as dominating the realm, and he will not be able to cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

"The cultivation of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is successful, and I need to comprehend the Chaos Dao below, my Chaos Dao has reached the extreme of the Law Aspect Realm, and then it is the Origin Realm!"

The Origin Realm is a new beginning for Ye Tian, only when he has stepped into the Origin Realm can he be regarded as truly stepping into the threshold of the Great Dao, and it can be regarded as laying the foundation before.

Those powerful supremes have all comprehended a great avenue to the origin realm.

In order to raise the Chaos Dao to the Origin Realm as soon as possible, Ye Tian not only had to use the Chaos Stone Carving, but also took out all the large number of auxiliary treasures stored in the Wasteland Tower, and assisted him in his cultivation at all costs.

The Desolate Realm is the Chaos Spirit Treasure World that chaos flows into, and the Desolate Tower contains the assets of an innate desolate clan, and its treasures are even comparable to an ordinary cosmic clan.

And Ye Tian cultivated so much at all costs, how fast his cultivation speed was raised.

If it was before, he didn't dare to waste resources so much, then even a supreme couldn't afford it, but Ye Tian didn't care now, why didn't he use the resources for nothing?

And so, another 2,000 years passed.

this day.

Deserted Tower.

The Chaos Dao Law Aspect that Ye Tian had cast had turned into an ancient well, and a trace of origin was gradually born in the ancient well, and this trace of origin was growing at an incredible speed.

In a short time, the origin of the ancient well was completely formed.

"The Origin Realm has arrived!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes and exhaled.

The realm of the Chaos Dao has reached the Origin Realm, which is undoubtedly a surge in strength for Ye Tian, the Chaos Dao of the Origin Realm is much stronger than the Origin Realm of other Great Dao, and even comparable to the Origin Peak Realm of other avenues.

And in today's universe, there are very few people who have reached the peak of the origin realm of the Great Dao realm, because once they step into the origin realm, it is very difficult to progress at all.

Even many Supremes don't know how to progress, and can only move forward in ignorance.

It can be said that Ye Tian's attainments in the Great Dao have surpassed other supremes, and the supreme is not as good as Ye Tian in the power of the Great Dao alone.

But Ye Tian knew very well that his current strength was still far from enough.

"Then comprehend those great powers, especially the time powers and space powers, these two powers can be the real hole cards, and the other powers are a little weaker. "

Immediately, Ye Tian began to focus on comprehending the Wheel of Time and the Spear of Hell Divine Void, striving to comprehend these two great divine powers to the consummation realm as soon as possible, which was the real great terror.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already entered the Wasteland for 10,000 years.

Tiange is managed by his sister and wife, coupled with his status in the human race, so there is nothing to do, except for occasional interrogations, Ye Tian almost didn't ask.

"It's been 10,000 years, and although my cultivation is still in the realm of the Universe God, it's much, much stronger than in the past. "

Ye Tian muttered.

No one knows how powerful he is now, only himself.

The Hellish Divine Sky Spear, a great spatial supernatural power, has reached the peak realm of Dacheng, the wheel of time has also reached the peak realm of Dacheng, and there are several other great supernatural powers of time and space, which have basically been cultivated to the realm of Xiaocheng or Dacheng.

The most important thing is that Ye Tian's Chaos Sky Knife has also been perfected to a new level, and the Chaos God Golem has become even more terrifying.

In addition, one of his hole cards, the Tiangang Battle Method, has finally been cultivated to the third type, which can comprehensively increase the combat power by ten times.

"It's time to leave the Wasteland, although there are still a lot of resources in the Wasteland, most of them are useless to me, if I continue to stay here, my progress will be slowed down, I need to find other opportunities to continue to improve my strength!"

Immediately, Ye Tian left the Wasteland, but he still left the second deity here.

The Wasteland is his territory, and it is also the way to retreat, if he really angers a powerful being, and even the Terrans can't protect him, he can completely retreat to the Wasteland.

Therefore, he did not want to expose the second deity and the desolate realm now.
